headline: Assessing AbbVie (ABBV) Valuation After New Dermatology Data And FDA Label Update
summary: AbbVie (ABBV) is back in focus after presenting a broad slate of dermatology data at the 2026 American Academy of Dermatology meeting, including long term results for Skyrizi and Rinvoq, as well as a new FDA label update. See our latest analysis for AbbVie. At a share price of US$214.98, AbbVie has seen a 3.76% 7 day share price return, a 30 day share price return of 8.23% and a year to date share price return of 6.25%, while longer term total shareholder returns of 8.29% over 1 year and...
